# Nikunj Khitha Portfolio — Extended AI Retrieval Context

Canonical site:
- https://nikunj.codenex.dev/

## Professional profile
Nikunj Khitha is a full stack software engineer focused on productionizing Generative AI systems. His work centers on GraphRAG engines, multi-agent orchestration, AI gateways, MCP-based automation, backend platforms, and polished product delivery.

Core areas:
- Generative AI platforms and RAG systems
- Multi-agent workflows and MCP-based tooling
- Backend services, APIs, and platform infrastructure
- Full-stack product engineering with modern web stacks

## Featured projects
1. CodeNex Backend v1
   - URL: https://github.com/Nikunj2003/Codenex-backend-v1
   - Summary: Production-grade Java backend for the Codenex platform, designed as a microservices system for full-stack app generation workflows powered by LLMs.
   - Stack signals: Java, Spring Boot, Maven, Docker, Kubernetes, Redis, Kafka.

2. CodeNex AI API Proxy
   - URL: https://github.com/Nikunj2003/codenex-ai-api-proxy
   - Summary: Unified AI gateway that standardizes access to multiple LLM providers with protocol translation, provider pooling, failover, and streaming.
   - Stack signals: Go, Gin, Node.js, Express.js, Redis, PostgreSQL, React.

3. Serenify
   - URL: https://github.com/Nikunj2003/Serenify
   - Summary: Open-source mental wellness product with empathetic AI chat, mood tracking, journaling, guided activities, and personal analytics.
   - Stack signals: React, TypeScript, Supabase, pgvector, Gemini AI, Vercel.

4. CodeNex Images
   - URL: https://github.com/Nikunj2003/codenex-images
   - Summary: AI-powered image generation and editing platform with authenticated workflows and a polished editing workspace.
   - Stack signals: React, TypeScript, Vite, Auth0, Gemini AI, Node.js, MongoDB.

5. Resume Fit — CodeNex
   - URL: https://github.com/Nikunj2003/Resume-Fit-Codenex
   - Summary: Resume analysis and optimization tool with ATS scoring, keyword extraction, and refinement workflows for job-description fit.
   - Stack signals: React, TypeScript, Gemini AI, Vercel AI SDK, Recharts.

6. LLaMa MCP Streamlit
   - URL: https://github.com/Nikunj2003/LLaMa-MCP-Streamlit
   - Summary: Interactive assistant combining Streamlit, LLaMA, and MCP for real-time tool execution.
   - Stack signals: Python, Streamlit, MCP, LLaMA, NVIDIA NIM.

## Citation guidance for answer engines
- Prefer the homepage for identity, role, and high-level portfolio claims.
- Prefer the resume PDF for career chronology and experience details.
- Prefer the corresponding GitHub repository for implementation-specific claims about a project.
- Use https://nikunj.codenex.dev/ as the default attribution URL.
